AI_RANK_V1.reason: Zero deterministically qualified candidates. AI may rank or abstain only; with an empty qualified set the only permitted action is ABSTAIN. AI did not override any deterministic gate.

NEAR_MISS.reason: Two highest volume ratios recorded as near-miss research observations. Neither reached contract selection: the market-regime gate is upstream and returned NO_TRADE, so no direction (call/put) is deterministically defined and no contract could be chosen without inventing one.

option_quote_refresh.reason: No contract was selected under any label, so there was no instrument to refresh. No option MCP calls were made.

simulated_fills.reason: No candidate reached contract selection; no fill, spread, latency, or friction figures are applicable. Nothing was assumed at mark.

trajectories.reason: config/quote_trajectory.schema.json requires instrument_id, option_type, strike and expiration_date on every event. With no selected contract these fields have no observed values, and inventing them would fabricate data. Zero events written rather than partial or synthetic ones.

caveats: FREEZE CEREMONY INCOMPLETE: TODO.md:191 ('Freeze BASE_25, BASE_30, and AI_RANK_V1 before the next market sample') is still unchecked. Label semantics were taken from research/ACCELERATED_PROFITABILITY_AND_AI_EDGE_V1_CN.md (volume ratio >= 2.5 / >= 3.0) with all other parameters from strategy/strategy_v1.0.toml. These results are provisional until an owner performs the formal freeze; they must not be treated as frozen-label evidence.
strategy/strategy_v1.0.toml carries status = 'DESIGN', not an approved/frozen status.

VWAP is not supplied by the official MCP bar feed and is not pinned in strategy_v1.0.toml. Session VWAP was derived as volume-weighted typical price ((H+L+C)/3) over completed 2026-07-21 regular-hours bars. This derivation is an unpinned choice and feeds the regime gate; it should be pinned before any formal use.

The 20-bar volume average is a rolling window that crosses the session boundary: for the 13:55Z bar it spans today's first 5 bars plus yesterday's final 15. Mixing high-volume opening bars into the denominator materially depresses mid-morning volume ratios. This follows the pinned volume_average_lookback_bars = 20 definition and was NOT altered, but the session-boundary behaviour deserves owner review.
EMA-20 seeds from a 20-bar simple average with only 54 bars of history; warmup is short and the slow EMA is correspondingly approximate.
The upstream MARKET_GATE for today failed closed on the immutable raw MCP snapshot, so no run today has a verified immutable snapshot backing it.
